name: feature.marketplace.nodes
description: Marketplace feature node pack (ADR 0022 / ADR 0014) — a READ-ONLY search node over the ctx.features.marketplace surface shipped by the Marketplace feature package. Finds an installable pack by name/keyword/capability from inside a workflow. Install is deliberately NOT a node — it mutates process-global state and is admin/host:*-scoped, so it stays a privileged REST action.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Marketplace Search
nodes.description: Searches installable + installed packs by name/keyword/capability over ctx.features.marketplace. Read-only — never installs.

nodes.label: Marketplace Listings
nodes.description: Lists ALL marketplace packs + install status over ctx.features.marketplace.listings (no query filter). Output: { listings, total }. Read-only — never installs.
